user.title: Stock Tracker Setup
user.description:
Search for stocks by name or enter symbols directly.

Examples: AAPL, MSFT, SAP.DE, BTC-USD, ^GSPC

data.search_query: Search by name (e.g. Apple, Tesla, SAP)
data.direct_symbols: Or enter symbols directly (e.g. AAPL, MSFT, TSLA)

select_symbol.title: Select Stock
select_symbol.description: Select the stock you want to track:

settings.title: Settings
settings.description:
Selected symbols: {selected_symbols} ({symbol_count} total)

Configure your preferences:

data.show_indicators: Enable technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger, etc.)

error.no_symbols: Please enter at least one stock symbol.
error.no_input: Please enter a search term or a stock symbol.
error.no_results: No stocks found for this search. Try a different term.
error.no_selection: Please select at least one stock from the list.
error.invalid_symbols: The following symbols could not be found: {invalid_symbols}
error.too_many_symbols: Maximum of 50 symbols allowed. Please remove some first.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to any data source. Check your internet connection.
error.already_tracked: This symbol is already being tracked.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: Stock Tracker is already configured. Use the Options menu to add more symbols.
abort.no_symbols_found: Could not find any valid symbols.

data.action: What would you like to do?

add_symbol.title: Add Stock
add_symbol.description:
Currently tracking {current_count} of {max_count} symbols.
Search by name or enter a symbol directly.

data.search_query: Search by name (e.g. Apple, BMW, Bitcoin)
data.direct_symbol: Or enter symbol directly (e.g. AAPL, BMW.DE, BTC-USD)

select_from_search.title: Select Stock to Add
select_from_search.description: Select the stock you want to add to your tracking list:

remove_symbol.title: Remove Stock
remove_symbol.description: Select the stock you want to stop tracking:

data.show_indicators: Show technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, etc.)

error.no_input: Please enter a search term or symbol.
error.no_results: No stocks found. Try a different search term.
error.invalid_symbols: Symbol not found on any data source.
error.already_tracked: This symbol is already being tracked.

abort.cannot_remove_all: Cannot remove all symbols. At least one symbol must remain.
abort.symbols_displayed: Your current symbols are shown as a notification.

add_stock.name: Add Stock
add_stock.description: Add a new stock symbol to tracking. The symbol will be validated and sensors will be created automatically.

symbol.name: Stock Symbol
symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol to add (e.g. AAPL, MSFT, SAP.DE, BTC-USD)

remove_stock.name: Remove Stock
remove_stock.description: Remove a stock symbol from tracking. Associated sensors will be removed.

symbol.name: Stock Symbol
symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol to remove (e.g. AAPL)

search.name: Search Stocks
search.description: Search for stock symbols by company name or ticker. Results are shown as a notification.

query.name: Search Query
query.description: Company name or ticker symbol to search for (e.g. Apple, Tesla)

limit.name: Result Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-50, default: 10)

refresh.name: Refresh Data
refresh.description: Force an immediate refresh of all stock data.

update_database.name: Update Symbol Database
update_database.description: Update the local symbol database with the latest listings from stock exchanges.
